category.scope_note: Electric vehicle conductive charging equipment comparison — China export to Rwanda.

title.en: China-to-Rwanda EV Charger Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国电动汽车充电桩进入卢旺达：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國電動汽車充電樁進入盧旺達：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of China EV charger documentation against Rwanda RSB / RURA / REG requirements, IEC 61851 safety and EMC standards, IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2 connector expectations, REG / EUCL grid-connection and project-approval requirements, RSB PVoC import-conformity process, OCPP interoperability, and China GB/T 18487 / GB/T 20234 baselines. Covers the full e-mobility context including Rwanda's electric-motorcycle (e-moto) battery-swap segment dominated by Ampersand and Spiro.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国电动汽车充电桩文件与卢旺达RSB / RURA / REG要求、IEC 61851安全及EMC标准、IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2接口预期、REG / EUCL并网及项目审批要求、RSB PVoC进口合格评定流程、OCPP互操作，以及中国GB/T 18487 / GB/T 20234基线的差距对照。涵盖卢旺达完整电动出行背景，包括以安培桑德（Ampersand）和斯皮罗（Spiro）为主导的电动摩托车电池换电细分市场。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國電動汽車充電樁文件與盧旺達RSB / RURA / REG要求、IEC 61851安全及EMC標準、IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2接口預期、REG / EUCL併網及項目審批要求、RSB PVoC進口合格評定流程、OCPP互操作，以及中國GB/T 18487 / GB/T 20234基線的差距對照。涵蓋盧旺達完整電動出行背景，包括以安培桑德（Ampersand）和斯皮羅（Spiro）為主導的電動摩托車電池換電細分市場。

answer_first.en: For China-made EV chargers entering Rwanda, the confirmed practical gaps are: connector hardware redesign from GB/T 20234 to IEC 62196 Type 2 (AC) / CCS2 (DC), since Rwanda's IEC-aligned infrastructure is physically incompatible with GB/T connectors; IEC 61851-based safety evidence required by RSB and project owners; RSB PVoC (Pre-export Verification of Conformity) import-conformity process for electrical equipment; RURA licensing and site approval for charging infrastructure operators; REG / EUCL grid-connection approval and load-management coordination for grid-tied installations; and OCPP back-office integration for networked chargers. Rwanda operates on 230 V single-phase / 400 V three-phase, 50 Hz — closely aligned with China's 220 V / 380 V baseline, so voltage derating risk is lower than in some other markets, but confirmation of input-range tolerance and tropical-humidity thermal design is still required. An important honest context: Rwanda's most active EV segment as of 2026 is electric motorcycles (e-motos) using battery-swap infrastructure (Ampersand, Spiro), not four-wheel IEC-socket chargers. The formal IEC 62196 four-wheel charging ecosystem is at an early deployment stage; exporters of 4-wheel chargers should confirm active project demand, RURA operator licensing status, and RSB PVoC requirements with local partners before shipment.
answer_first.zh: 中国制造电动汽车充电桩进入卢旺达时，已确认的实务差距包括：接口硬件重新设计，从GB/T 20234改为IEC 62196 Type 2（交流）/ CCS2（直流），因为卢旺达IEC体系基础设施在物理上与GB/T接口不兼容；RSB及项目业主要求的基于IEC 61851的安全证据；电气设备进口须经RSB PVoC（出口前合格验证）流程；充电基础设施运营商须取得RURA许可证及场地审批；并网安装须取得REG / EUCL并网审批及负载管理协调；联网充电桩须集成OCPP后台。卢旺达采用230 V单相 / 400 V三相、50 Hz电网，与中国220 V / 380 V基线较为接近，因此电压降额风险低于部分其他市场，但仍须确认输入范围容差及热带湿度环境下的热设计。重要背景说明：截至2026年，卢旺达最活跃的电动汽车细分市场是采用电池换电基础设施的电动摩托车（以安培桑德、斯皮罗为代表），而非四轮IEC插座充电桩。正式的IEC 62196四轮充电生态系统尚处于早期部署阶段；四轮充电桩出口商在出货前应通过本地合作伙伴确认实际项目需求、RURA运营商许可状态及RSB PVoC要求。
answer_first.zht: 中國製造電動汽車充電樁進入盧旺達時，已確認的實務差距包括：接口硬體重新設計，從GB/T 20234改為IEC 62196 Type 2（交流）/ CCS2（直流），因為盧旺達IEC體系基礎設施在物理上與GB/T接口不兼容；RSB及項目業主要求的基於IEC 61851的安全證據；電氣設備進口須經RSB PVoC（出口前合格驗證）流程；充電基礎設施運營商須取得RURA許可證及場地審批；併網安裝須取得REG / EUCL併網審批及負載管理協調；聯網充電樁須集成OCPP後台。盧旺達採用230 V單相 / 400 V三相、50 Hz電網，與中國220 V / 380 V基線較為接近，因此電壓降額風險低於部分其他市場，但仍須確認輸入範圍容差及熱帶濕度環境下的熱設計。重要背景說明：截至2026年，盧旺達最活躍的電動汽車細分市場是採用電池換電基礎設施的電動摩托車（以安培桑德、斯皮羅為代表），而非四輪IEC插座充電樁。正式的IEC 62196四輪充電生態系統尚處於早期部署階段；四輪充電樁出口商在出貨前應通過本地合作夥伴確認實際項目需求、RURA運營商許可狀態及RSB PVoC要求。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, RSB PVoC scope determination, RURA licensing approval, REG / EUCL grid-connection approval, electrical-installation design, customs determination, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, network operators, and installers should verify current Rwanda conformity assessment rules, RURA operator licensing requirements, REG / EUCL grid-connection procedures, RSB PVoC requirements, IEC standard editions, and installation rules with qualified professionals before shipment or installation.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、RSB PVoC适用范围裁定、RURA许可批准、REG / EUCL并网审批、电气安装设计、海关裁定或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商、网络运营商和安装方在出货或安装前，应与合格专业人士核验现行卢旺达合格评定规则、RURA运营商许可要求、REG / EUCL并网程序、RSB PVoC要求、IEC标准版本及安装规则。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、RSB PVoC適用範圍裁定、RURA許可批准、REG / EUCL併網審批、電氣安裝設計、海關裁定或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商、網絡運營商和安裝方在出貨或安裝前，應與合格專業人士核驗現行盧旺達合格評定規則、RURA運營商許可要求、REG / EUCL併網程序、RSB PVoC要求、IEC標準版本及安裝規則。

editorial_controls.source_policy: Official regulator, standards body, utility, customs authority, electrical-installation authority, or primary legal source preferred. Local PDFs are not accepted.
editorial_controls.change_control: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true.
